title: crepidium setipes
intro: Crepidium setipes, also known as the 'Spider Orchid', is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Orchidaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Crepidium setipes include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory infections, due to its expectorant and antiseptic properties. Crepidium setipes is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion by boiling the roots and leaves in water, and can also be taken in capsule or powder form as a dietary supplement.
